title: tenn well 20cm Plant Pot with Liner, Cotton Indoor Planter Woven Storage Basket for Indoor Plants Flower Pot and Home Decoration (Black and Brown)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY - Made of natural cotton, the plant pot is safe to use. Reinforced woven on the basket to hold your flower pot safely. Upgraded version with a liner built in to avoid water leakage
SIZE - 7.8" (20cm) Diameter x 7.8" (20cm) Height. This plant pot basket best fits flower pot from 15 cm up to 17 cm in diameter and 17cm or less in height

GREAT FOR INDOOR PLANT POT - By giving plant pot a whole new cover with this plant pot, it can not only beautify plants, add brightness for your modern home and lifestyle, but also can save your space

WIDE APPLICATION - This indoor plant basket is also a great storage bin to help keep your home well organized. It can be used to store toys, towels, sundries, socks etc. You could use it in your living room, bedroom, restroom and office
WAY TO RESHAPE - Shipping folded could make the basket distort for a little, you could either iron the basket outside or filled it with something bigger like blankets for a while to help restore
description: Product Description 20CM PLANT POT WITH LINER 20cm x 20cm plant pot with liner is great for decorating potted planter and brings a leisure modern feeling for your rooms. SPECIFICATIONS Material: Cotton Rope and Plastic Liner Size: 7.8" (20cm) Diameter x 7.8" (20cm) Height Fits Flower Pot: from 15 cm up to 17 cm in diameter and 17cm or less in height Colour: Black and Brown Package Included: 1 Pack Planter Basket INDOOR PLANT POT COVER The plant pot can be used to decorate potted house planter, beautify your favorite plants. The natural woven cotton texture is healthy and does not hurt the environment. Plus it adds a modern flair to your house. STORAGE BASKET FOR TOYS It is also a good storage basket that can be used to organise small items like toys, towels, sundries, socks and magazines. REMINDER NOTES The planter basket might distort for a little as it is folded during shipping. To restore its round shape, you could either iron the basket outside or filled it with something bigger like blankets for a while.
